first_test_result: Tracker enforcement covers every docs/services asset and watchdog CLI tests cover --once JSON and real snapshot behavior.
notes: Added for public linked service assets referenced from backup hook install docs.

user_story: As a toolbox user I can rely on public starter template JSON matching ctx-toolbox init behavior
expected_behavior: Public starter JSON files remain in sync with embedded wheel fallback templates so docs checkout users and PyPI users seed the same starter toolboxes
first_test_result: Toolbox CLI regression compares docs/toolbox/templates JSON to the embedded fallback path used when templates are absent from installed wheels.
notes: Added for public starter preset assets referenced from starter toolbox docs.
